title: Israel says will take ‘control’ of security zone up to Lebanon’s Litani River
summary_full: Lebanon was dragged into the Middle East war when Hezbollah began firing rockets into Israel in early March to avenge the killing of Iran's supreme leader Ayatollah Ali Khamenei
summary_public: Lebanon was dragged into the Middle East war when Hezbollah began firing rockets into Israel in early March to avenge the killing of Iran's supreme leader Ayatollah Ali Khamenei

IR.label: negative
